interactive_parts.name: Mitochondria
interactive_parts.fact_kid: Mitochondria are like tiny power plants inside the cell. They give you energy!
interactive_parts.fact_genius: They produce ATP and actually have their own DNA separate from the cell's nucleus.

interactive_parts.name: Nucleus
interactive_parts.fact_kid: The nucleus is the boss! It holds all the instructions that tell the cell what to do.
interactive_parts.fact_genius: The nucleus is a membrane-bound organelle that contains the cell's chromosomes (DNA).
